features: It has a fresh and an irresistibly refreshing fragrance
Ideal for tightening and closing pores
Refreshes and Tone the skin with the distinctive fragrance of Brut
description: Product Description Brut brings you this after shave lotion which revitalizes your skin and leaves you with a soothing feel. Take delight in the cool feel and rich aroma of this after shave that has a fresh and an irresistibly refreshing fragrance. Use Brut Oceans after shave that is ideal for tightening and closing pores. This after shave lotion makes sure that your pores are free from germs and do not cause skin problems. Awaken your tired skin to this after shave lotion every morning and start your day on a zesty note. Refreshes and tone the skin with the distinctive fragrance of Brut. Ingredients Alcohol, Aqua, Parfum, Directions Apply to skin after shaving, preferably in the morning. Box Contains 1 x Brut Sport Style Aftershave Lotion 100 ml See more
